decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to use enchantress cards such as Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence to draw cards and generate mana, allowing you to cast combo pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. By combining cards like Solitary Confinement and Serra's Sanctum, you can create a powerful board state that overwhelms your opponent. The deck also includes cards like Mirri's Guile and Sterling Grove to set up your draws and protect your combo pieces. With the right setup, you can quickly establish a dominating presence on the battlefield and secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to control the board through strong counter spells and removal, while also utilizing cards like Standstill to slow down the game and gain card advantage. The deck focuses on managing the opponent's threats with cards such as Wrath of God and Swords to Plowshares, while also providing win conditions with cards like Decree of Justice and Mishra's Factory. By efficiently controlling the game through countering spells and disrupting the opponent's strategy, this deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure a victory.

The key concept of this deck is to use a combination of removal spells, discard spells, and land destruction to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By disrupting their hand, removing their threats, and keeping their resources in check, this deck aims to grind out a win through attrition. The inclusion of powerful control cards like Vindicate and Gerrard's Verdict, along with versatile threats like Eternal Dragon, allows the deck to adapt to a variety of matchups and maintain control of the game state.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly assemble the Tinker Fling combo by using cards like Altar of Dementia, Oath of Druids, and Phyrexian Devourer to fill up the graveyard with creatures and artifacts. Once the combo is set up, players can use Tinker to fetch Fling from the deck and sacrifice a massive creature to deal lethal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes mana acceleration and protection cards to ensure a fast and consistent win condition.

The deck focuses on using the Hermit Druid combo to fill the graveyard with creatures quickly, which can then be reanimated or sacrificed for various effects. It utilizes cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also running a variety of utility creatures like Psychatog and Akroma, Angel of Wrath. The deck aims to establish a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and combos, leading to a quick and decisive victory.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the Ill-Gotten Gains combo by using cards like Intuition and Dark Ritual to generate mana and find the necessary pieces. Once Ill-Gotten Gains is cast, the player can then loop cards like Lion's Eye Diamond, Brain Freeze, and Recoup to mill their opponent's entire deck. The deck also includes cards like Orim's Chant and Deep Analysis for disruption and card draw to help find the combo pieces. The focus is on fast and efficient combo execution to win the game before the opponent can react.

The main strategy of this deck is to control the game through powerful spells and removal while utilizing the Oath of Druids enchantment to cheat out large creatures like Terravore and Exalted Angel. The deck also incorporates land destruction with cards like Wasteland and Cataclysm to disrupt the opponent's mana base. With a mix of creatures, removal, and disruption, this deck aims to dominate the board and overwhelm the opponent with its strong creatures and efficient control elements.

This deck focuses on controlling the game by using Survival of the Fittest to search for essential creatures like Goblin Sharpshooter and Deranged Hermit. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration with cards like Birds of Paradise and Gaea's Cradle to quickly ramp up and overwhelm the opponent. By efficiently managing resources and using cards like Wirewood Symbiote to protect key creatures, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and secure victory through attrition and board control.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can disrupt opponents. The deck includes a lot of card draw and counterspells to help find and protect the combo pieces, while also utilizing other disruptive cards like Misdirection, Thwart, and Powder Keg. The strategy revolves around efficiently using resources to control the game and protect the combo until victory can be achieved.

The deck focuses on quickly ramping up mana with creatures like Llanowar Elves and Priest of Titania, allowing for explosive plays with powerful cards like Masticore and Deranged Hermit. The strategy is to flood the board with Elves, abusing Gaea's Cradle and Survival of the Fittest to maintain card advantage and power through the opponent's defenses. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a large, aggressive board presence while being able to adapt to different situations with cards like Wirewood Symbiote and Nantuko Vigilante.

The main focus of this White Weenie deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressively costed creatures and disruptive removal spells. The deck aims to establish board control early with efficient creatures like Mother of Runes, Savannah Lions, and Silver Knight, while controlling the opponent's threats with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Disenchant. Cards like Exalted Angel provide powerful late-game threats to finish off the opponent. With a land destruction element from Wasteland and disruptive abilities from Whipcorder, the deck looks to maintain pressure and control throughout the game.

The deck focuses on using the Phyrexian Dreadnought creature in combination with Stifle and other counter spells to quickly win the game in a single turn. The strategy involves playing control elements to protect the combo pieces while drawing into the necessary cards to assemble the combo. This allows for a fast and efficient win condition that can catch opponents off guard and secure victory before they have a chance to respond effectively.

This mono black aggro deck aims to disrupt the opponent's hand with cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress while applying pressure with efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Ravenous Rats. The deck also utilizes cards like Withered Wretch and Smother to deal with threats on the board. It aims to control the game with disruption and removal spells while steadily drawing cards with Phyrexian Arena to maintain card advantage. The deck's strategy revolves around a proactive game plan of attacking the opponent while disrupting their resources.

The deck focuses on playing low-cost, aggressive red creatures and burn spells to quickly chip away at the opponent's life total. By utilizing efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic, as well as powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast, the deck aims to pressure the opponent early and finish the game before they can stabilize. Additionally, cards like Price of Progress further punish opponents for playing nonbasic lands, increasing the deck's ability to deal damage and close out games swiftly.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly fill the graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells like Reanimate and Exhume. By discarding creatures with cards like Cabal Therapy and Unmask, the player can set up explosive turns where they bring back massive threats like Akroma, Angel of Wrath and Verdant Force. The deck also includes control elements like Duress and Dark Ritual to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the combo.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling and protecting the Phyrexian Dreadnought combo, using Stifle to counter any attempts to counter it. It includes counterspells, draw spells, and cantrips to control the game and find pieces of the combo. The goal is to play Phyrexian Dreadnought and then Stifle its enter-the-battlefield ability, allowing you to have a 12/12 creature on the board for only 1 mana. The deck aims to win the game quickly by overwhelming the opponent with a massive threat that is difficult to deal with.
